debug_info.goal:
x a : Fin 4 → ℝ
h₀ : Function.Injective a
h₁ : ∀ (i : Fin 4), ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = 1
⊢ (x 0, x 1, x 2, x 3) = Imo1966P5.solution_fun (a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3)

proof:
have := h₀
  simp only [Fin.isValue] at *
  let s := [a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3]
  have hmin : ∃ i, ∀ j, a i ≤ a j := by simp; exact List.minimum_of_length_pos _ (by decide)
  have hmax : ∃ i, ∀ j, a j ≤ a i := by simp; exact List.maximum_of_length_pos _ (by decide)
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hmin
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hmax
  have hne : a i ≠ a l := by intro he; apply h₀; simpa using he
  funext k
  simp [solution_fun]
  split_ifs with hk
  · have : ∀ j ≠ i ∧ j ≠ l, x j = 0 := by
      intro j hj
      have : ∀ m, m ≠ i → m ≠ l → a m ≠ a i ∧ a m ≠ a l := by
        intro m hm hml
        exact ⟨ne_of_lt (hi m ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hi m) (Ne.symm hm))), 
               ne_of_lt (hl m ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hl m) (Ne.symm hml)))⟩
      have := h₁ j
      simp [abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hi j ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hi j) (Ne.symm hj.1)))),
            abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hl j ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hl j) (Ne.symm hj.2)))),
            this j j.2.1 j.2.2] at this
      linear_combination this
    simp [this]
    have := h₁ i
    simp [abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hl i ▸ lt_of_le_of_ne (hl i) (Ne.symm hk.1))),
          abs_of_neg (sub_neg_of_lt (hi l ▸ lt_of_le_of_ne (hi l) hne))] at this
    linear_combination (this - 1) / (a l - a i)
  · have : ∀ j, j ≠ i ∧ j ≠ l → x j = 0 := by
      intro j hj
      have : ∀ m, m ≠ i → m ≠ l → a m ≠ a i ∧ a m ≠ a l := by
        intro m hm hml
        exact ⟨ne_of_lt (hi m ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hi m) (Ne.symm hm))), 
               ne_of_lt (hl m ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hl m) (Ne.symm hml)))⟩
      have := h₁ j
      simp [abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hi j ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hi j) (Ne.symm hj.1)))),
            abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hl j ▸ (lt_of_le_of_ne (hl j) (Ne.symm hj.2)))),
            this j j.2.1 j.2.2] at this
      linear_combination this
    simp [this]
    have := h₁ k
    simp [abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hi k ▸ lt_of_le_of_ne (hi k) (Ne.symm hk))),
          abs_of_pos (sub_pos_of_lt (hl k ▸ lt_of_le_of_ne (hl k) (Ne.symm hk)))] at this
    linear_combination this
